title: VDE Annual Salary by Employee, 2010–2023 (CTHRU)
description: Per-employee, per-year salary and pay records for Massachusetts DDS-Det Vocational Disability Examiners (CTHRU title LIKE '%DISAB EXAMINER%', MRC). CY2010–2023 (pre-2010 CTHRU data unavailable). Source: Massachusetts CTHRU public payroll (dataset rxhc-k6iz), pulled 2026-05-04. ~2,609 data rows. Includes VDE I–IV title variants and pay grades 20, 21, 23. Massachusetts public-record payroll, not confidential.

columns.name: position_title
columns.description: Raw CTHRU position title (e.g. VOCATIONAL DISAB EXAMINER I).

columns.name: grade
columns.description: Pay grade (20 = VDE I, 21 = VDE II, 23 = VDE III per CBA).

columns.name: annual_rate
columns.description: Annualized scheduled salary rate at snapshot.

columns.name: snapshot_through
columns.description: Date through which pay data is captured.

notes: 2023 totals incomplete — latest CTHRU snapshot only through ~2023-01-14 (~2 weeks); annual_rate reliable for all years. Pre-2010 (2001–2009) not available in CTHRU. Massachusetts public-record payroll data.
